mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.item_id, i.title AS item_title, i.owner_type AS item_owner_type, c.claimer_id, claimer.real_name AS claimer_name, i.user_id AS owner_id, owner.real_name AS owner_name, c.reason, c.status, c.admin_note, c.created_at, c.reviewed_at FROM item_claim c LEFT JOIN lost_found_item i ON c.item_id = i.id LEFT JOIN sys_user claimer ON c.claimer_id = claimer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user owner ON i.user_id = owner.id WHERE c.id = #{claimId}

SELECT c.id, c.item_id, i.title AS item_title, i.owner_type AS item_owner_type, c.claimer_id, claimer.real_name AS claimer_name, i.user_id AS owner_id, owner.real_name AS owner_name, c.reason, c.status, c.admin_note, c.created_at, c.reviewed_at FROM item_claim c LEFT JOIN lost_found_item i ON c.item_id = i.id LEFT JOIN sys_user claimer ON c.claimer_id = claimer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user owner ON i.user_id = owner.id WHERE c.claimer_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.item_id, i.title AS item_title, i.owner_type AS item_owner_type, c.claimer_id, claimer.real_name AS claimer_name, i.user_id AS owner_id, owner.real_name AS owner_name, c.reason, c.status, c.admin_note, c.created_at, c.reviewed_at FROM item_claim c LEFT JOIN lost_found_item i ON c.item_id = i.id LEFT JOIN sys_user claimer ON c.claimer_id = claimer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user owner ON i.user_id = owner.id WHERE c.item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.item_id, i.title AS item_title, i.owner_type AS item_owner_type, c.claimer_id, claimer.real_name AS claimer_name, i.user_id AS owner_id, owner.real_name AS owner_name, c.reason, c.status, c.admin_note, c.created_at, c.reviewed_at FROM item_claim c LEFT JOIN lost_found_item i ON c.item_id = i.id LEFT JOIN sys_user claimer ON c.claimer_id = claimer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user owner ON i.user_id = owner.id WHERE c.status = 'pending' ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_claim (item_id, claimer_id, reason) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{claimerId}, #{reason})
mapper.update: UPDATE item_claim SET status = #{status}, admin_note = #{adminNote}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{claimId} AND status = 'pending'
UPDATE lost_found_item SET status = 'claimed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{itemId} AND status = 'pending'
UPDATE item_claim SET status = 'deleted', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{claimId}
UPDATE item_claim SET status = 'expired', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'pending' AND created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item_claim) AS totalClaims, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item_claim WHERE status = 'pending') AS pendingClaims, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item_claim WHERE status = 'approved') AS approvedClaims, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item_claim WHERE status = 'rejected') AS rejectedClaims, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item_claim WHERE status = 'expired') AS expiredClaims
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item_claim WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND claimer_id = #{claimerId} AND status IN ('pending', 'approved')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item_claim c LEFT JOIN lost_found_item i ON c.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status = 'pending'

SELECT DATE(c.created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approvedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN c.status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejectedCount FROM item_claim c WHERE c.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(c.created_at) ORDER BY date DESC
